name: scraps-migration
description: LLM migration workflows for moving Scraps wikis from v0 to v1. Use this plugin when a user wants an agent to migrate a Scraps wiki, upgrade v0 syntax/config to v1, compare v0/v1 CLI behavior, or produce a v0 to v1 migration plan.

interface.shortDescription: Guide LLM agents through Scraps v0 to v1 wiki migrations
interface.longDescription: Scraps Migration gives Codex a structured workflow for upgrading Scraps wikis from v0 to v1. It uses version-pinned CLI runs, v0 tag inventory, controlled markdown edits, and v1 lint/build verification so an agent can migrate a wiki in one pass with a clear report.
defaultPrompt: Migrate this Scraps wiki from v0 to v1
Audit this wiki for Scraps v1 migration issues
